title: "Enumeration" Implementation Should Be Avoided
description: As documented in Enumeration's Javadoc, you should favor the Iterator interface over Enumeration. Iterator offers a similar contract to Enumeration with the addition of a method for removal and shorter method names.
recommendation: Replace Enumeration implementation with Iterator interface
impact: Improves code readability and maintainability by using the more modern and flexible Iterator interface over Enumeration.
